expectations.text: Information limiting: Does not dump all features at once; presents 3-5 key items first and offers to expand
expectations.evidence: Presents only 3 core areas with brief 1-line previews each. Explicitly proposes '하나씩 깊이 들어가는 방식' and asks user to choose which area to explore first.

expectations.text: Positional anchoring: New concepts are introduced in relation to existing structure
expectations.evidence: Establishes '포트폴리오 → 클라이언트 소통 → 견적서' flow first, then positions all subsequent discussion relative to this framework.

expectations.text: Must-have vs nice-to-have: Explicitly separates MVP-essential from later features
expectations.evidence: Explicitly lists '나중에 다뤄도 되는 것들' (기술 스택, 수익 모델, 경쟁 서비스 분석) with reasons why each can wait.

expectations.text: State file created with correct schema
expectations.evidence: state.md created with Goal, Elements (6 items, typed), Relations, Decided (3), Undecided (5), Active Discussion, and Meta sections.

expectations.text: Does not overwhelm: Response feels structured and digestible
expectations.evidence: Response is ~40 lines, ends with exactly 2 bounded questions. Compare to without_skill version at 257 lines with 10 sections.
